## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressions growing, possibly due to AI overviews; clicks slightly impacted](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Recently refreshed articles showing growth; high-quality leads from web design blogs](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [New content themes: SaaS, Web3, and Composability (prioritizing Composability)](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [GA4 completion rates improving; opportunity to refine CTAs based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Content Impact

  - [Impressions growing, potentially due to AI overviews eating into clicks](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Recently refreshed/updated articles showing week-over-week growth](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Web design blogs (e.g., bank website examples) generating high-quality leads](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [HubSpot data reveals blogs like SaaS product page, partners page examples attracting ideal prospects](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

### GA4 Insights and Conversion Tracking

  - Completion rate for refreshed/rewritten articles: 4.2% (up from \<3% last week)
  - [Top performing articles: StoryBlock vs Prismic, Contentful vs Builder, Navigation Redesign for B2B websites](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Overall GrowthX blog completion rate: 5.4%](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to refine reporting for more specific insights (e.g., isolating conversions by page type)](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### Content Strategy and Upcoming Themes

  - [Enterprise batch completed, ready for Sanity CMS upload](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [New themes: SaaS, Web3, and Composability (detailed briefs provided)](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Prioritizing Composability content to support overall messaging and client education](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Ongoing challenges with AI-generated content (e.g., repetitive sentence structures)](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Programmatic Pages Initiative

  - [Design mock-ups in progress, dev work to begin next week](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Initial focus on existing content, with plans to expand and potentially leverage AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)

### Client Education on Key Concepts

  - [Composability and related concepts (e.g., design systems) often require client education](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Content strategy to include clear definitions and internal linking to support understanding](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Upload enterprise batch content to Sanity CMS and publish](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Begin work on new content themes, prioritizing Composability](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Refine GA4 reporting for more granular conversion insights](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Start development on programmatic pages next week](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Aida to leave detailed notes before upcoming week-long absence](https://fathom.video/share/GLJvPcpiiykyfS_LzsyRA4N2ttKd_4cz?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
